methodology.no_squad: copilot without --agent squad (raw model, no coordination)
methodology.memory_only: copilot without --agent squad but with decisions.md injected (memory context only)
methodology.coord_only: copilot --agent squad with empty decisions.md (no accumulated memory)

key_findings: Coordination is the primary driver: coord-only averages 92.5% vs memory-only 48.75%
Memory without coordination is HARMFUL in coding domain (40% vs 90% no-squad baseline)
Database domain REQUIRES coordination for file output (0% without, 90% with)
Full Squad adds ~7.5% reliability over coord-only alone (100% vs 92.5%)
Pattern is consistent across all 4 domains
